## Type of change

- [ ] `feat` — new feature
- [ ] `fix` — bug fix
- [ ] `refactor` — no behaviour change
- [ ] `chore` — tooling, deps, docs
- [ ] `ci` — pipeline change

## Test plan

- [ ] `pnpm build` passes with no type errors

- [ ] Edge cases covered (empty state, error state, reload)
